case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. BRIAND WILLIAMS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, BRIAND $1,034.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,119.94, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
